subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of Bahá! I have found no name or title greater and more noble than this wherewith to praise thee today [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه البهاء اسم و لقبی اعظم و اشرف از این نیافتم که ترا بان بستایم الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort
